The Gale or Storm Signal No.8 is now issued, and will remain in force at least until 10 a. m. on Thursday (14 November). High Speed Rail train service remains normal on Thursday. 

MTRCL will coordinate with the Mainland if the weather conditions deteriorate, or a higher Tropical Cyclone Warning Signal is issued, and train services may be suspended. 

Before departure, please check the train information through 12306 official website (12306. cn) , mobile app or High Speed Rail website; stay tuned for the road or traffic conditions, and allow more time to travel to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
